chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-7732 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.32719/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 05.03.2025 Mr.Arshad Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel for the petitioner, the matter pertains to show cause notice and it is the contention of the petitioner that the same is unwarranted inter alia being time barred. Be that as it may, it is contended that the petitioner shall contest the notice before the issuing authority and the same may be directed to adjudicate vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned Assistant Attorney General articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
